## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance rebounded strongly: 59 more clicks (15% growth), 34k more impressions (30% increase) week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Alt text completed for all images on the site](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Top-performing pages: Foreign registration (IL, CA, NC), Washington State, New Jersey](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [GA conversion tracking for demo bookings not functioning properly; Dave (SEO expert) to be consulted](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [268 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Site-wide performance:](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [459 clicks (+59 WoW)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [146k impressions (+34k WoW)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [CTR down 0.1% (negligible due to impression growth)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Blog performance:](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Clicks stable (up 1 WoW)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Impressions up 27% WoW](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Top LLM citations since early August:](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [Foreign registration pages (IL, CA, NC)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [ChatGPT overtaking Perplexity as top LLM cited](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on keeping foreign registration pages fresh (esp. IL, CA, NC)](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

  - [Top non-resource pages: Homepage, Careers, App, About](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Current content cluster to last a few more weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Long-term strategy: Regular audits of top-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Check pricing, competitor analysis, potential content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/6i-JNPA9m1N3sHbRaseZYm_TRgZs97iA?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
